name: Sopes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut shortening into flour in a large bowl with a pastry blender or two knives until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Gradually add water, kneading until smooth. Add chiles; mix well.
3. Divide dough into 16 small balls. Pat each ball into 3 inch patties; place on waxed paper.
4. Heat 1 teaspoon oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat for 1 minute.
5. Cook patties for 3 minutes on each side or until golden brown, adding additional oil as needed.
6. Top with beans, cheese, salsa and dollop of sour cream.
7. Makes 16 appetizers.
